districts.name: Guest Gate
districts.summary: Arrival cords sort strangers into guest, debtor, cousin, danger, and unresolved.
districts.featureDescription: Old cords tighten or loosen as people state their names beneath them.

districts.name: Many Hearths
districts.summary: Clan fires share one broad court while ancestors compete to improve the arrangements.
districts.featureDescription: Each clan contributes one coal; sparks consistently favor the absent families.

districts.name: Ancestor Lane
districts.summary: Shrines, genealogists, and discreet family arguments occupy houses built around old trees.
districts.featureDescription: Carved faces change their resemblance according to who is currently apologizing.

landmarks.name: the orphan hearth
landmarks.description: A warm stone hearth waits in open country for a family nobody remembers losing.
